seo_desc: Calculate TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) and Macros (Protein, Carb, Fat) scientifically to help you lose fat and gain muscle effectively.
title: MEASURE CALORIES BURNED IN <0>1 DAY</0>
subtitle: Accurately calculate TDEE to optimize your training and nutrition process

form.adj_gain_muscle: Default +300 for muscle gain. You can edit this.
form.adj_gain_weight: Default +500 for weight gain. You can edit this.
form.adj_lose_fat: Default -300 for fat loss. You can edit this.
form.adj_lose_weight: Default -500 for weight loss. You can edit this.
form.adj_maintain: Default 0 for maintenance. You can edit this.
form.notice_goal: You have changed your goal. Please click 'Calculate' again to update.

info.tdee_desc: <0>TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure)</0> is the total amount of calories you burn in a day, including basal metabolic rate (BMR), physical activity, and food digestion. Knowing your TDEE helps you adjust your diet and training to reach your goals.
info.macro_desc: Once you know your total energy requirement, the next step is to determine the macronutrients <0>(macros)</0> including: <1>Protein</1>, <2>Carb</2>, and <3>Fat</3>. Would you like me to calculate this based on the above parameters?
info.meal_title: 3. What will the specific meal plan look like?
info.meal_desc: After calculating your <0>macros</0>, would you like me to <1>suggest a daily meal plan</1> based on those parameters? Click the button below to receive a sample menu with diverse foods to better support your goals.
info.macro_note: 🔥 Here is the adjusted calories from your initial TDEE of <0>{{tdee}}</0> kcal to the required calories for <1>{{goal}}</1> which is <2>{{adjusted}}</2> kcal. Please track and adjust weekly accordingly.

manual.title: Manual Macro Entry
manual.desc: Enter your Protein, Carb, and Fat stats. The system will automatically calculate Calories and take you straight to the Meal Plan Suggestion.
manual.err_empty: Please enter at least one macro value.

tools.title: Training support <0>tools</0>
tools.desc: Combine nutrition with exercises for the best results
tools.exercises_desc: Create personalized workout routines by muscle groups and export PDF.
tools.mealplan_desc: Get nutritional menus tailored for fat loss or muscle gain.
tools.stories_desc: See real body transformation journeys from our students.

warnings.error_data: Error loading TDEE data, please recalculate
warnings.missing_tdee: Please calculate TDEE before using this feature
